SEARCH
Package co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto

Class FacturaDTO

java.lang.Object
co.edu.unbosque.venta.dto.FacturaDTO
public class FacturaDTO extends Object
Data Transfer Object representing an invoice (Factura). Combines client information, sale details, and totals for a sale.
Author:
Santiago Rada

  • Constructor Details

    • FacturaDTO

      public FacturaDTO()
      Default constructor

    • FacturaDTO

      public FacturaDTO(Long codigoVenta, ClienteDTO cliente, List<DetalleVentaDTO> detalles, Double valorVenta, Double ivaVenta, Double totalVenta)
      Parameterized constructor to create a FacturaDTO instance.
      Parameters:
      codigoVenta - unique sale code
      cliente - client information
      detalles - list of sale details
      valorVenta - total value before VAT
      ivaVenta - VAT value
      totalVenta - total value including VAT
